name: KSHV_vIRF_paralog_cluster
description: KSHV viral interferon regulatory factor cluster vIRF1-4 (K9, K10.5/K11, K10, K11) encoded as four host-IRF-mimicking paralogs at ~84-90 kb. Each vIRF antagonizes a different arm of innate antiviral signaling (vIRF1 blocks IRF3/CBP-p300; vIRF3 inhibits PKR; vIRF4 disrupts MDM2-p53). Cross-paralog nucleotide identity ~35-50% — moderate paralog disambiguation needed at conserved DBD regions.
